## 3. Architecture Insights

### Strengths

- **Multi-tenant architecture** well-implemented (531 company_id references in routes)
- **RBAC enforcement** consistently applied (66 requireRole middleware uses)
- **XSS prevention** patterns in place (209 escapeHtml/sanitize uses)
- **Error handling** comprehensive (253 catch blocks in routes)
- **Modular microservices** - 10 isolated engines

### Areas for Improvement

- **Console.log cleanup** - 69 debug statements in production routes
- **TODO comments** - 19 unresolved TODO/FIXME items
- **Dependency updates** - 35 outdated packages
- **Test coverage** - Only 35 test files for 378 JS files

### Multi-tenancy Audit

| Area | Status | Evidence |
|------|--------|----------|
| API Routes | ✅ Excellent | 531 company_id filters |
| Frontend | ✅ Good | company_id in all API calls |
| Engines | ✅ Good | Tenant-aware services |
| Data Isolation | ✅ Strong | Mongoose middleware |

### RBAC Audit

| Role | Enforcement | Notes |
|------|-------------|-------|
| CONSULTANT | ✅ | Super-admin, multi-company access |
| BUSINESS_OWNER | ✅ | Company admin |
| EXECUTIVE | ✅ | Department oversight |
| MANAGER | ✅ | Team management |
| EMPLOYEE | ✅ | Own tasks only |

## 6. Security Posture

| Category | Status | Last Audit | Notes |
|----------|--------|------------|-------|
| XSS Prevention | ✅ Strong | Mar 2026 | 209 sanitization uses |
| RBAC Enforcement | ✅ Strong | Mar 2026 | 66 middleware uses |
| Multi-tenant Isolation | ✅ Strong | Mar 2026 | 531 company_id filters |
| JWT Security | ✅ Good | Feb 2026 | Production checks in place |
| Input Validation | ⚠️ Moderate | - | Some endpoints need review |
| Rate Limiting | ⚠️ Incomplete | - | TD-002 pending |

### Security Recommendations

1. **Implement rate limiting** (TD-002) - Prevent AI endpoint abuse
2. **Audit input validation** - Review all POST/PUT endpoints
3. **Add security headers** - HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options
4. **Implement managed_businesses** (TD-001) - CONSULTANT scope control

### Session Quality Correlation

```
Quality 10/10: Sessions with clear scope, pre-read docs, focused deliverable
Quality 9/10:  Good planning, minor scope creep or debugging
Quality 8/10:  Some exploration needed, unexpected blockers
Quality <8/10: Context switching, unclear requirements, external blocks
```

---

## 14. Recommendations to Improve Claude Usage

### High Impact Improvements

#### 1. Use `/insights` Weekly
**Current**: Ad-hoc project health checks
**Recommended**: Run `/insights quick` at start of each week
**Impact**: Catch tech debt early, track trends, maintain visibility
```
Every Monday: /insights quick
End of sprint: /insights full
```

#### 2. Keep Sessions Under 2 Hours
**Current**: Some 3-5h marathon sessions
**Recommended**: Break into 1-2h focused sessions
**Impact**: Higher quality scores, less context fatigue
```
Instead of: 1x 5h session (quality drops)
Do: 3x 1.5h sessions (quality stays high)
```

#### 3. Always Start with `/init`
**Current**: Sometimes jumping straight to work
**Recommended**: Every session starts with `/init`
**Impact**: Ensures context is fresh, prevents duplicate work
```
Session start → /init → Review state → Pick task → Work
```

#### 4. Use `/close` to End Sessions
**Current**: Sessions sometimes end abruptly
**Recommended**: Always run `/close` before stopping
**Impact**: Learnings captured, handoff ready, next session faster
```
Work complete → /close → Captures insights → Ready for next
```

### Medium Impact Improvements

#### 5. Batch Similar Work Together
**Current**: Mixed coding/testing/planning in single sessions
**Recommended**: Group by session type
**Impact**: Deeper focus, higher quality output
```
Day 1 AM: /coding - Features
Day 1 PM: /testing - Validate
Day 2: /strategy - Plan next sprint
```

#### 6. Pre-read Before Coding Sessions
**Current**: Sometimes reading docs during session
**Recommended**: Review epic spec before starting
**Impact**: Less token usage, faster implementation
```
Before session: Read EPIC-X-SPEC.md (5 min)
During session: More coding, less exploration
```

#### 7. Create Issue Tickets for Bugs
**Current**: Bugs tracked in handoff docs
**Recommended**: Use structured issue format (ISS-SXX-NNN)
**Impact**: Better tracking, clearer priorities
```
ISS-S15-001: [Component] Brief description
- Repro steps
- Expected vs Actual
- Fix location hint
```

### Quick Wins

#### 8. Use Parallel Tool Calls
**Tip**: Claude can run multiple independent operations simultaneously
**Example**: Searching + reading files at once saves time

#### 9. Be Specific in Prompts
**Less effective**: "Fix the bug"
**More effective**: "Fix ISS-S15-009 in assessment-flow.js - consultant invitations using wrong company_id"

#### 10. Reference File Paths
**Less effective**: "Update the goals file"
**More effective**: "Update server/routes/goals.js line 150-200"

---

## 15. Session Optimization Checklist

### Before Every Session

- [ ] Run `/init` to load context
- [ ] Review current sprint handoff document
- [ ] Identify specific deliverable (1-3 items max)
- [ ] Set time limit (recommend: 1-2 hours)

### During Session

- [ ] Stay focused on declared deliverable
- [ ] If scope creeps, note it for next session
- [ ] Use TodoWrite for multi-step tasks
- [ ] Test changes before declaring complete

### After Every Session

- [ ] Run `/close` (if available) or update handoff manually
- [ ] Commit changes with descriptive message
- [ ] Note any blockers or follow-ups
- [ ] Update sprint progress

### Weekly Habits

- [ ] Monday: `/insights quick` - Check project health
- [ ] Before sprint: `/sprint-review` - Validate plan
- [ ] End of sprint: `/insights full` - Comprehensive review
- [ ] Monthly: Review PERFORMANCE_METRICS.md trends

---

## 16. Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid

| Anti-Pattern | Problem | Solution |
|--------------|---------|----------|
| **Marathon sessions (>3h)** | Quality degrades, context overload | Break into 1-2h chunks |
| **Skipping /init** | Missing context, duplicate work | Always start with /init |
| **Vague prompts** | Wasted tokens exploring | Be specific with file paths |
| **Context switching** | Loss of focus, errors | Batch similar work |
| **Not using handoffs** | Lost progress on restart | Update handoff after each session |
| **Ignoring tech debt** | Accumulation, future bugs | Address 1-2 TODOs per sprint |
| **No testing session** | Bugs reach production | Dedicate testing sessions |

## Appendix: Commands Used

```bash
# File counts
find . -type f -name "*.js" ! -path "*/node_modules/*" | wc -l  # 378
find . -type f -name "*.html" ! -path "*/node_modules/*" | wc -l  # 235
find . -type f -name "*.md" ! -path "*/node_modules/*" | wc -l  # 742

# Security checks
grep -rn "company_id" server/routes/*.js | wc -l  # 531
grep -rn "requireRole" server/routes/*.js | wc -l  # 66
grep -rn "escapeHtml" client/ --include="*.js" | wc -l  # 209

# Tech debt
grep -rn "TODO\|FIXME" server/ client/ --include="*.js" | wc -l  # 19
npm outdated | wc -l  # 35
```
